traces.raw_model_output: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE  ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution pgmr:data_collection ?dataCollection . ?dataCollection pgmr:data ?researchData . ?researchData pgmr:data_type ?dataType . OPTIONAL  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . traces.extracted_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dataCollection . ?dataCollection orkgp:DATA ?researchData . ?researchData orkgp:P7055 ?dataType . OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?researchData)) IN ("true", "yes", "1")) } ORDER BY ?paperLabel
traces.gold_sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel ?researchData ?dataType ?dataTypeLabel
WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ;
                    orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
    ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .

    ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dataCollection .
    ?dataCollection rdfs:label ?dc_label .
    ?dataCollection orkgp:DATA ?researchData .
    ?researchData orkgp:P7055 ?dataType .

    ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
    ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel .

    FILTER NOT EXISTS {
        ?researchData orkgp:url ?url .
    }
    FILTER(?dc_label != "no collection"^^xsd:string)
    FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string)
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel ?dataTypeLabel

WHERE {
